title: Measurement Telemetry And Artifact Contract Verification
scope: Verify the public measurement, telemetry, artifact, redaction, comparability, and optional telemetry export contract layer.
verification_method: Repository inspection, JSON parse checks, forbidden file scan, and contract fixture inspection.
preconditions: The repository remains a public specification and contract repository.
No runner implementation code or executable automation is added for this contract layer.
procedure: Confirm measurement schemas exist under schemas/measurement/v1/.
Confirm artifact schemas exist under schemas/artifact/v1/.
Confirm valid and invalid fixtures exist under fixtures/public-contracts/measurement/ and fixtures/public-contracts/artifacts/.
Confirm adapter and test-executor schemas expose telemetry capability discovery as optional metadata.
Confirm documentation states that implementation telemetry is auxiliary unless explicitly required by a run plan.
Confirm documentation does not require any specific telemetry backend or raw artifact format.
Parse all JSON contract, fixture, and SpecTrace files.
Scan for forbidden source code and executable automation extensions.
Validate that every typed protocol-family required metric resolves uniquely to the v2 catalog and uses the catalog unit and aggregation.
Validate normalized protocol execution result fixtures, snapshot bindings, unique check and metric identities, and the rule that an overall pass requires every required check to pass.
expected_result: The repository defines language-neutral telemetry and artifact contracts, examples, and traceability without adding runtime collectors, SDKs, scripts, workflows, source code, or implementation-specific packages.
